text.title: Compliance Checklist by Domain — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the engagement actually touch a regulatory domain?

branch.when: domain_touched == true AND owner_named AND existing_checklist_current
domain_touched == true AND owner_named AND no_existing_checklist

example.trace: ENG-42 → GDPR touched → owner=Maria → new GDPR checklist (42 items)
